implementation_summary.summary: CP00-881 closes the RP29 Commercial Readiness P03 interface evidence, review, and handoff tail while opening the P04 UI foundation through RP29.P04.M04.S15. It adds descriptor-only UI surface, data dependency, loading, empty, denied, review-required, permission badge, audit hint, responsive, keyboard/focus, visual-density, and build-smoke evidence while keeping runtime UI actions, API endpoints, runtime receipts, permission decisions, audit writes, unauthorized data/count leaks, real client data, credentials, and secrets closed.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-881 RP29.P03.M06.S12-RP29.P04.M04.S15 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
